sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The ModelTemplate class, implemented in Cython, serves as a foundational base for machine learning models within the AnalysisG framework. It provides a standardized interface for managing input and output features for graph-based data, as well as configuring the computational device and model checkpoints. This class is designed to be inherited by specific model implementations, offering common functionalities and efficient interaction with an underlying C++ model structure.

sect1.title: The ModelTemplate Class
sect1.para: ModelTemplate is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. This design allows for direct and optimized interaction with C++ objects and types, which is crucial for performance in machine learning applications. It encapsulates a pointer (self.nn_ptr) to a C++ model_template object, managing its lifecycle and exposing its parameters as Python properties.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes self.rename to False. If the instance is not ModelTemplate itself (i.e., it's a subclass), it returns immediately. Otherwise, it initializes a new C++ model_template object and assigns its pointer to self.nn_ptr.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer, intentionally left empty as primary initialization is handled by __cinit__.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. If the instance is not ModelTemplate itself, it returns. Otherwise, it deallocates the C++ model_template object pointed to by self.nn_ptr, ensuring proper memory management.

cdef dict conv(self, map[string, string]* inpt): An internal helper method to convert a C++ map<string, string> (passed as a pointer) into a Python dictionary. It iterates through the C++ map and uses env to convert C++ strings to Python strings for both keys and values.
inpt
A pointer to a C++ map<string, string>.
A Python dictionary.

cdef map[string, string] cond(self, dict inpt): An internal helper method to convert a Python dictionary into a C++ map<string, string>. It iterates through the Python dictionary and uses enc to convert Python strings to C++ strings for both keys and values. If self.rename is False, it also sets the C++ model's name to the Python class name.
inpt
A Python dictionary.
A C++ map<string, string>.

sect2.title: Properties
sect2.para: These properties provide controlled access to the configuration and state of the ModelTemplate.

listitem.para: @property o_graph: Gets and sets a dictionary representing output graph features. The getter converts a C++ map to a Python dict using conv. The setter converts a Python dict to a C++ map using cond.
@property o_node: Gets and sets a dictionary representing output node features. Similar conversion logic as o_graph.
@property o_edge: Gets and sets a dictionary representing output edge features. Similar conversion logic as o_graph.
@property i_graph: Gets and sets a list of input graph features. The getter converts a C++ vector to a Python list using env_vec. The setter converts a Python list to a C++ vector using enc_list.
@property i_node: Gets and sets a list of input node features. Similar conversion logic as i_graph.
@property i_edge: Gets and sets a list of input edge features. Similar conversion logic as i_graph.
@property device: Gets and sets the computational device (e.g., "cpu", "cuda:0") as a string.
@property checkpoint_path: Gets and sets the path to the model checkpoint file as a string.
@property weight_name: Gets and sets the name of the weight to be used by the model as a string.
@property tree_name: Gets and sets the name of the ROOT tree associated with the model as a string.

@property name: Gets and sets the name of the model. If self.rename is False, it defaults to the Python class name. Setting this property explicitly sets self.rename to True and updates the C++ model's name.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The ModelTemplate class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class ModelTemplate: Declares ModelTemplate as a Cython extension type.
cdef model_template *nn_ptr: A C++ pointer to a model_template object, managed by the Cython class.
from libcpp.string cimport string: Imports the C++ std::string type.
from libcpp.map cimport map, pair: Imports C++ std::map and std::pair types.
from AnalysisG.core.tools cimport *: Imports C++ declarations from tools.pxd, including env, enc, env_vec, enc_list for string and list conversions.
from AnalysisG.core.model_template cimport model_template: Imports the C++ model_template class declaration from its .pxd file.
cython.operator.dereference as deref: Used to dereference C++ pointers.
